title: AI System Inventory
objective: Maintain a living, authoritative inventory of all AI systems and related components to enable risk-based governance, security, privacy, and lifecycle control.

title: System Asset Management
objective: Maintain a complete, accurate inventory of information systems, applications, interfaces, and data stores—classified and owned—so security, resilience, and compliance controls can be prioritized and enforced.

title: BYOD Asset Management
objective: Control risk from personally owned devices accessing organizational systems/data.

title: Data Mapping
objective: Document end-to-end data flows for collection, processing, storage, sharing, retention, and deletion—including AI training and inference—so controls can be applied precisely.

title: AI Impacts
objective: Identify potential impacts of AI on individuals, groups, organizations, society, and integrate mitigations.

title: Risk Identification
objective: Identify risks spanning cyber, privacy, safety, ethics, and AI trust to enable consistent analysis and prioritization.

title: Insider Threat
objective: Proactively identify, monitor, and mitigate risks posed by insiders—employees, contractors, or third parties—who may intentionally or unintentionally compromise organizational assets, data, or AI systems.

title: Supply Chain Risk
objective: Identify and manage risks from suppliers of software, models, datasets, and cloud services.

title: Security Thresholds
objective: Define alarm thresholds and decision criteria for security events to ensure timely, consistent response.

title: AI Operational Thresholds
objective: Define measurable thresholds for AI performance, fairness, drift, safety, and explainability, with rollback and HITL criteria.

title: Threat Management
objective: Continuously identify, assess, and track threats to information systems and AI assets to inform defenses and investment.
